Disruption.description: Ability to disrupt offenses through blocks, steals, and deflections.

Double.description: STL * BLK, awarding defenders that can disrupt in multiple ways.

Dist.description: Distance covered on defense per 100 possessions.

adjPMRim.description: FG%+- when closest defender on shots taken within 6 ft of the rim.

MatchupDiff.description: Matchup difficulty, calculated by weighted average of PTS/100 of opponents guarded.

AdjPMAll.description: FG%+- when closest defender on shots anywhere.

Versatility.description: Matchup versatility, rewarding players that can guard multiple positions.

Dist.description: Distance covered on defense per 100 possessions.
